Mahdi Saleh

Senior Applied Scientist
Zillow
m.saleh (at) tum.de


About Me

Hello! I’m Mahdi (also Mehdi) Saleh. I am a Senior Applied Scientist at Zillow, working on 3D vision and generative modeling. If you are interested in PhD internships or related opportunities, please reach out—I am happy to connect.

I completed my doctoral studies at the Technical University of Munich under Federico Tombari and Nassir Navab. My research areas include 3D object pose, hierarchical representations, graph neural networks, and vision-language models. I hold a Master’s degree in Biomedical Computing from TUM and a Bachelor’s in Electrical Control Engineering from IUST. In my leisure time, I enjoy computer graphics and design, web development, and game design.

Research Interests

  • 3D computer vision and Machine Learning
  • 6D Object pose estimation
  • Hierarchical representations and Graph Neural Networks
  • Vision Language Models

News

  • [2026] Defended my Ph.D. thesis in April, titled Hierarchical Representations for 3D Shape Understanding. The examination committee passed me with distinction; the degree was awarded summa cum laude.
  • [2026] Paper accepted at CVPR 2026 (ConceptPose project page).
  • [2025] Joined VSAI as Senior Research Engineer.
  • [2025] Paper accepted at CVPR 2025 (ESCAPE project page).
  • [2025] Zillow acquired VSAI; I joined Zillow as a Senior Applied Scientist.
  • [2024] Paper accepted at ICRA 2024.
  • [2023] Paper accepted at ICCV 2023.
  • [2023] Paper accepted at MICCAI 2023 and 1 paper for ShapeMI MICCAI Workshop.
  • [2023] Paper accepted at CVPR 2023.
  • [2023] Starting a PhD research internship at Meta Reality Labs, Redmond, WA.
  • [2022] Won 2 awards at BOP 6D Object Pose 2022 challenge. Details
  • [2022] 1 paper accepted at IROS 2022, Kyoto, Japan.
  • [2022] 2 papers accepted at CVPR 2022, New Orleans, USA.
  • [2021] 1 paper accepted at NeurIPS 2021.
  • [2021] Starting a PhD research internship at Facebook Reality Labs, CA.
  • [2021] Recognized as an Outstanding Reviewer at CVPR 2021.
  • [2020] Accepted Oral paper at 3DV 2020.

Publications

  1. CVPR
    ConceptPose: Training-Free Zero-Shot Object Pose Estimation using Concept Vectors
    Kuang, Liming; Velikova, Yordanka; Saleh, Mahdi; Zaech, Jan-Nico; Paudel, Danda Pani; Busam, Benjamin
    IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition, 2026
    PDF Code Project Page

  2. CVPR
    ESCAPE: Equivariant Shape Completion via Anchor Point Encoding
    Bekci, Burak; Saleh, Mahdi; Tombari, Federico; Navab, Nassir
    IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition, 2025
    PDF Code Project Page

  3. ICRA
    Physics-Encoded Graph Neural Networks for Deformation Prediction under Contact
    Saleh, Mahdi; Sommersperger, Michael; Navab, Nassir; Tombari, Federico
    IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation, 2024
    Code Project Page

  4. IROS
    CloudAttention: Efficient Multi-Scale Attention Scheme For 3D Point Cloud Learning
    Saleh, Mahdi; Wang, Yige; Navab, Nassir; Busam, Benjamin; Tombari, Federico
    International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems, 2022
    PDF

  5. CVPR
    Bending Graphs: Hierarchical Shape Matching using Gated Optimal Transport
    Saleh, Mahdi; Wu, Shun-Cheng; Cosmo, Luca; Navab, Nassir; Busam, Benjamin; Tombari, Federico
    IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition, 2022
    PDF Code

  6. CVPR
    ZebraPose: Coarse to Fine Surface Encoding for 6DoF Object Pose Estimation
    Su, Yongzhi; Saleh, Mahdi; Fetzer, Torben; Rambach, Jason; Navab, Nassir; Busam, Benjamin; Stricker, Didier; Tombari, Federico
    IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition, 2022
    PDF Code Winner of the BOP 2022 Challenge

  7. NeurIPS
    CoFiNet: Reliable Coarse-to-fine Correspondences for Robust PointCloud Registration
    Yu, Hao; Li, Fu; Saleh, Mahdi; Busam, Benjamin; Ilic, Slobodan
    Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems 34, 2021

  8. 3DV

Student Projects

  • Supervising various Master’s theses and projects in the field of 3D computer vision, including topics like 3D shape completion, multimodal 3D understanding, and deformable shape matching.
